response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the song title from on-screen text: 'チョコレートテンション' (Chocolate Tension). 2. Performed a web search for '"Chocolate Tension" Himemori Luna Japanese and English lyrics'. 3. Extracted lyrics from the video directly based on the on-screen karaoke display. 4. Broken the video into segments: singing, followed by conversational/dialogue segments.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a 3D karaoke session with four Hololive VTubers (Natsuiro Matsuri, Shishiro Botan, Shiranui Flare, Himemori Luna) singing 'Chocolate Tension', followed by a segment of casual conversation and game-like dialogue between them in the same room.

scenes.description: The four VTubers perform 'Chocolate Tension' while singing, with the lyrics appearing in the bottom right corner of the screen.
scenes.performer_in_video: Natsuiro Matsuri, Shishiro Botan, Shiranui Flare, Himemori Luna
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
きっとこの恋は少し甘くて
たまに苦くて割れてしまいそう
不器用なハート壊して
チョコレートテンション
冷たいミルクに溶かして
いっそゴクンとしてしまえば
少しは良くなるかな
この恋は少し深くて
たまに浅くてわかんないや
不確かな心理に迫って
甘いシチュエーション
素敵な笑顔でぐしゃっと
私だけにねえ笑ってよ
それだけでいいからさ
甘い夢を見させて
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Surely this love is a little sweet
Sometimes bitter and likely to break
Breaking my clumsy heart
Chocolate tension
If I melt it into cold milk
And just swallow it whole
Will it be a little better?
This love is a little deep
Sometimes shallow and I don't get it
Approaching an uncertain state of mind
Sweet situation
With a lovely smile, crush it
Hey, smile only for me
That's all I need
Let me dream a sweet dream

scenes.description: The VTubers stop singing and engage in casual conversation in the karaoke room.
The dialogue continues with the VTubers discussing game-like rules and interacting in the room.
